'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 3''' was the 3rd issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[August]] and [[September]] [[1996]] and containing 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*Q&A
*Readers' Poll
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*Exclusive Interview: [[Anthony Daniels]] on… Anthony Daniels!
*:<small>[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] himself answers the questions he's been bombarded with over the years by enthusiastic Star Wars fans!</small>
*[[The Making of Star Wars (feature)|The Making of ''Star Wars'']]
*:<small>The characters are brought to life…</small>
*"The Secrets of the Empire" {{C|by [[Kevin Stevens]]}}
*:<small>Confused by THX? What's an ILM when it's at home? [[Kevin Stevens]] explores the many worlds created through the organisations [sic] established by [[George Lucas]]…</small>
*Essential Characters: [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] {{C|by [[Andy Mangels]]}}
*:<small>The second part of [[Andy Mangels]]' [sic] Essential Guide to Alien Species series, in which the scavenging Jawas come under the spotlight.</small>
*''[[Boba Fett: Bounty on Bar-Kooda]]''
*:<small>Part Three of Three. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] has tracked down his prey – but the prey has teeth… BIG teeth!</small>
